name: ThreatDown (Malwarebytes)
description: Endpoint security platform providing malware detection, ransomware protection, and device management capabilities

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your ThreatDown OAuth2 application client ID from the Integrate page in Nebula console

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Your ThreatDown OAuth2 application client secret

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Verifies that all endpoints have security agents installed and are reporting status

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Maintains an inventory of all managed endpoints

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that threat detection monitoring is active and recent detections are being tracked

checks.name: Encryption at Rest
checks.description: Verifies device encryption policies are configured and enforced

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Verifies that security incidents are being detected and properly responded to
